title: Lepisorus kolesnikovii
intro: Lepisorus kolesnikovii is a species of fern, a type of vascular plant characterized by its leafy fronds and underground rhizomes. Traditionally, Lepisorus kolesnikovii is used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and inflammation, due to its anti-inflammatory and antipyretic properties. The bioactive constituents of Lepisorus kolesnikovii include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal effects. In herbal medicine, Lepisorus kolesnikovii is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it is also used in the production of traditional Chinese herbal remedies, such as tonics and poultices.
